## openItemDescriptor variable

Centralized descriptor for the `open` command.

Drives CLI subcommand `open` and MCP tool `open`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
openItemDescriptor: import("../registry/define.js").ResolvedCommandDescriptor<{
    id: string;
}, OpenResult, z.ZodObject<{
    id: z.ZodString;
}, "strip", z.ZodTypeAny, {
    id: string;
}, {
    id: string;
}>>
```
